# Edge cases

Handling for non-happy-path situations during `/project-init`.

## Project has existing CLAUDE.md not generated by us

Read it first. Ask the user: "Existing CLAUDE.md found — merge new sections in, replace entirely, or keep as-is?"

- **Merge** — preserve user-authored sections (Architecture, Mandatory rules), inject the standard template's missing sections (Documentation inventory, Skills, Linear workflow), do not overwrite anything the user wrote.
- **Replace** — back up the original to `CLAUDE.md.bak` first, then write the fresh template.
- **Keep** — skip CLAUDE.md generation; continue with the rest of the flow (skills, settings, tracker, docs).

## Linear team detection fails

`mcp__claude_ai_Linear__list_teams` returns an MCP error. Ask the user to type the prefix manually; if they want to skip Linear entirely, fall through to the "Linear skipped" branch in step 8 output.

## No Linear teams exist

`list_teams` returns an empty list. Exit step 7.5 with: "No Linear teams found. Create one manually in Linear, then re-run `/project-init --linear-only`." Continue the rest of the project init (CLAUDE.md, docs, settings.json) — only the Linear automation is skipped.

## `save_project` or `save_issue` MCP call fails

Print the error. Skip the rest of step 7.5. Continue to step 8. Do NOT partial-roll-back; the user can clean up in Linear UI if needed.

## No internet for fetching upstream skills

When step 4A would copy templates from a remote source: skip the `/install-flutter-skills` portion (or equivalent for other stacks); user can re-run later when the network is back.

## Stack is exotic / not covered by templates

Interview-scaffold via step 4B. Warn the user that some `plugins/forge/docs/testing/<platform>.md` references in CLAUDE.md may not exist yet. The user can either create those docs or remove the references. <!-- TODO: linting docs not migrated, deleted in EPIC E -->

## User refuses interview-scaffold for a new stack

Generate a minimal CLAUDE.md only (no per-project skills). Let the user populate `.claude/skills/` manually later via `/init` or `/claude-md-management:claude-md-improver`. Note this prominently in the step 8 output.

## Flutter scaffolder fails (non-zero exit)

HALT immediately. Surface the scaffolder's stderr to the chat. Do not attempt to clean up `<target>` — the user inspects and decides whether to delete or fix forward.

## `gh` not installed / unauthenticated (Flutter 4A-flutter.5.2)

Print the install / auth hint and skip the GitHub step gracefully. Continue with Linear (4A-flutter.5.3). The user can run `gh repo create ...` manually later.

## Conflicting GitHub repo name

When `gh repo view <name>` succeeds (repo already exists): ask the user "Rename the project, use that existing repo, or skip GitHub?" Wait for the answer before continuing. Do not auto-rename.
